ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "sim_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "sim_type" TEXT /* Type of simulation (e.g., agent-based, discrete-event) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of simulation creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of simulation update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the agent belongs to */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "agent_type" TEXT /* Type of agent (e.g., autonomous, scripted) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of agent creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of agent update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., velocity, position) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., numeric, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behaviors" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent the behavior belongs to */,
  "behavior_name" TEXT /* Name of the behavior (e.g., move, interact) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the behavior */,
  "behavior_type" TEXT /* Type of the behavior (e.g., action, reaction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behaviors_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the environment belongs to */,
  "env_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the environment */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environments_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "background_conditions" (
  "bg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each background condition */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment the background condition belongs to */,
  "bg_name" TEXT /* Name of the background condition (e.g., spot, uniform) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the background condition */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the background condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_background_conditions_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "obstacle_conditions" (
  "obstacle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each obstacle condition */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment the obstacle condition belongs to */,
  "obstacle_name" TEXT /* Name of the obstacle condition (e.g., second, close) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the obstacle condition */,
  "shape" TEXT /* Shape of the obstacle condition (e.g., circle, rectangle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obstacle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_obstacle_conditions_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES environments ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the outcome belongs to */,
  "tick" INTEGER /* Tick number of the simulation */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent the outcome belongs to */,
  "x_pos" REAL /* X-position of the agent */,
  "y_pos" REAL /* Y-position of the agent */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Velocity of the agent */,
  "angle" REAL /* Angle of the agent */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward for the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_outcomes_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_outcomes_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent the score belongs to */,
  "tick" INTEGER /* Tick number of the simulation */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the agent */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of the score (e.g., cumulative, average) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_scores_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation data */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent the goal belongs to */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name of the goal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goal_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal the progress belongs to */,
  "tick" INTEGER /* Tick number of the simulation */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress of the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_progress_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id")
)
